prompt.content: Which description best defines a reflection?

choices.content: A transformation that turns every point around a fixed center by the same angle
A transformation that maps each point to the opposite side of a line, the same perpendicular distance from that line
A transformation that slides every point the same distance in the same direction
A transformation that stretches a figure horizontally or vertically

steps.content: In a reflection, the line of reflection is the perpendicular bisector of the segment joining each point to its image.
